experiences.responsibilities: Designed and managed a statistical poll using stratified random sampling. Led data analysis for thousands of responses during the 2023-2024 elections. Worked as a surveyor during the 2023 elections.
Developed the back-end of the app. Collaborated with front-end developers to ensure a smooth user experience. Designed and implemented based on user preferences.
Developed a rudimentary CNN model for forge signature detection. Created a signature detection system using camera and YOLO. Developed a verification form using OTP for emails.
